verses.latin_vulgate: In mense octavo, in anno secundo Darii regis, factum est verbum Domini ad Zachariam filium Barachiæ filii Addo prophetam, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּחֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ הַשְּׁמִינִ֔י בִּשְׁנַ֥ת שְׁתַּ֖יִם לְדָרְיָ֑וֶשׁ הָיָ֣ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶל־זְכַרְיָה֙ בֶּן־בֶּ֣רֶכְיָ֔ה בֶּן־עִדּ֥וֹ הַנָּבִ֖יא לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the eighth month, in the second year of king Darius, the word of the Lord came to Zechariah the son of Barachias, the son of Addo, the prophet, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahdeksantena kuukautena toisena Dariuksen vuotena, tapahtui Herran sana Sakarjalle Berekian pojalle, Iddon pojalle, prophetalle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: In the eighth month, in the second year of Darius, came the word of the Lord unto Zechariah, the son of Berechiah, the son of Iddo the prophet, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Iratus est Dominus super patres vestros iracundia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קָצַ֧ף יְהֹוָ֛ה עַל־אֲבֽוֹתֵיכֶ֖ם קָֽצֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord hath been exceeding angry with your fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on ollut vihainen teidän isillenne sangen kovasti.
verses.king_james: The Lord hath been sore displeased with your fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dices ad eos :   Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum :  Convertimini ad me, ait Dominus exercituum,  et convertar ad vos, dicit Dominus exercituum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַרְתָּ֣ אֲלֵהֶ֗ם כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת שׁ֣וּבוּ אֵלַ֔י נְאֻ֖ם יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֑וֹת וְאָשׁ֣וּב אֲלֵיכֶ֔ם אָמַ֖ר יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt say to them: Thus saith the Lord of hosts: Turn ye to me, saith the Lord of hosts: and I will turn to you, saith the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sano siis heille: näin sanoo Herra Zebaot: kääntykäät minun tyköni, sanoo Herra Zebaot; niin minä käännyn teidän tykönne, sanoo Herra Zebaot.
verses.king_james: Therefore say thou unto them, Thus saith the Lord of hosts; Turn ye unto me, saith the Lord of hosts, and I will turn unto you, saith the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne sitis sicut patres vestri,  ad quos clamabant prophetæ priores, dicentes :  Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum :  Convertimini de viis vestris malis,  et de cogitationibus vestris pessimis :  et non audierunt, neque attenderunt ad me,  dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּהְי֣וּ כַאֲבֹֽתֵיכֶ֡ם אֲשֶׁ֣ר קָרְאֽוּ־אֲלֵיהֶם֩ הַנְּבִיאִ֨ים הָרִֽאשֹׁנִ֜ים לֵאמֹ֗ר כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת שׁ֤וּבוּ נָא֙ מִדַּרְכֵיכֶ֣ם הָרָעִ֔ים (ומעליליכם) [וּמַֽעַלְלֵיכֶ֖ם] הָֽרָעִ֑ים וְלֹ֥א שָׁמְע֛וּ וְלֹֽא־הִקְשִׁ֥יבוּ אֵלַ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Be not as your fathers, to whom the former prophets have cried, saying: Thus saith the Lord of hosts: Turn ye from your evil ways, and from your wicked thoughts: but they did not give ear, neither did they hearken to me, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älkäät olko niinkuin teidän isänne, joille entiset prophetat saarnasivat, sanoen: näin sanoo Herra Zebaot: palatkaat teidän pahoista teistänne ja teidän häijystä menostanne; mutta ei he kuulleet, eikä totelleet minua, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: Be ye not as your fathers, unto whom the former prophets have cried, saying, Thus saith the Lord of hosts; Turn ye now from your evil ways, and from your evil doings: but they did not hear, nor hearken unto me, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Patres vestri, ubi sunt ?  et prophetæ numquid in sempiternum vivent ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲבֽוֹתֵיכֶ֖ם אַיֵּה־הֵ֑ם וְהַ֨נְּבִאִ֔ים הַלְעוֹלָ֖ם יִֽחְיֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Your fathers, where are they? and the prophets, shall they live always?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kussa nyt ovat teidän isänne? ja vieläkö prophetat elävät?
verses.king_james: Your fathers, where are they? and the prophets, do they live for ever?

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen verba mea, et legitima mea,  quæ mandavi servis meis prophetis,  numquid non comprehenderunt patres vestros,  et conversi sunt, et dixerunt :  Sicut cogitavit Dominus exercituum facere nobis  secundum vias nostras, et secundum adinventiones nostras,  fecit nobis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣ךְ ׀ דְּבָרַ֣י וְחֻקַּ֗י אֲשֶׁ֤ר צִוִּ֙יתִי֙ אֶת־עֲבָדַ֣י הַנְּבִיאִ֔ים הֲל֥וֹא הִשִּׂ֖יגוּ אֲבֹתֵיכֶ֑ם וַיָּשׁ֣וּבוּ וַיֹּאמְר֗וּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר זָמַ֜ם יְהֹוָ֤ה צְבָאוֹת֙ לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת לָ֔נוּ כִּדְרָכֵ֙ינוּ֙ וּכְמַ֣עֲלָלֵ֔ינוּ כֵּ֖ן עָשָׂ֥ה אִתָּֽנוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But yet my words, and my ordinances, which I gave in charge to my servants the prophets, did they not take hold of your fathers, and they returned, and said: As the Lord of hosts thought to do to us according to our ways, and according to our devices, so he hath done to us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö niin ole tapahtunut, että minun sanani ja oikeuteni, jotka minä minun palveliaini prophetain kautta käskin, ovat teidän isiinne sattuneet? että heidän täytyi palata ja sanoa: niinkuin Herra Zebaot ajatteli meille tehdä meidän teittemme ja töittemme jälkeen, niin hän on myös meille tehnyt.
verses.king_james: But my words and my statutes, which I commanded my servants the prophets, did they not take hold of your fathers? and they returned and said, Like as the Lord of hosts thought to do unto us, according to our ways, and according to our doings, so hath he dealt with us.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die vigesima et quarta undecimi mensis Sabath, in anno secundo Darii, factum est verbum Domini ad Zachariam filium Barachiæ filii Addo prophetam, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיוֹם֩ עֶשְׂרִ֨ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֜ה לְעַשְׁתֵּֽי־עָשָׂ֥ר חֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ הוּא־חֹ֣דֶשׁ שְׁבָ֔ט בִּשְׁנַ֥ת שְׁתַּ֖יִם לְדָרְיָ֑וֶשׁ הָיָ֣ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶל־זְכַרְיָה֙ בֶּן־בֶּ֣רֶכְיָ֔הוּ בֶּן־עִדּ֥וֹא הַנָּבִ֖יא לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the four and twentieth day of the eleventh month which is called Sabath, in the second year of Darius, the word of the Lord came to Zechariah the son of Barachias, the son of Addo, the prophet, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljäntenä päivänä kolmattakymmentä ensimäisessä kuukaudessa toistakymmentä, joka on Sebatin kuu, toisena Dariuksen vuotena, tapahtui Herran sana Sakarjalle Berekian pojalle, Iddon pojalle, prophetalle, ja hän sanoi:
verses.king_james: Upon the four and twentieth day of the eleventh month, which is the month Sebat, in the second year of Darius, came the word of the Lord unto Zechariah, the son of Berechiah, the son of Iddo the prophet, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidi per noctem, et ecce vir ascendens super equum rufum, et ipse stabat inter myrteta, quæ erant in profundo, et post eum equi rufi, varii, et albi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָאִ֣יתִי ׀ הַלַּ֗יְלָה וְהִנֵּה־אִישׁ֙ רֹכֵב֙ עַל־ס֣וּס אָדֹ֔ם וְה֣וּא עֹמֵ֔ד בֵּ֥ין הַהֲדַסִּ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּמְּצֻלָ֑ה וְאַחֲרָיו֙ סוּסִ֣ים אֲדֻמִּ֔ים שְׂרֻקִּ֖ים וּלְבָנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: I saw by night, and behold a man riding upon a red horse, and he stood among the myrtle trees, that were in the bottom: and behind him were horses, red, speckled, and white.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä näin yöllä, ja katso, mies istui ruskian hevosen päällä, ja seisahti myrttien sekaan laaksossa, ja hänen takanansa olivat ruskiat ja maksankarvaiset ja valkiat hevoset.
verses.king_james: I saw by night, and behold a man riding upon a red horse, and he stood among the myrtle trees that were in the bottom; and behind him were there red horses, speckled, and white.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi : Quid sunt isti, domine mi ? Et dixit ad me angelus qui loquebatur in me : Ego ostendam tibi quid sint hæc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֖ר מָה־אֵ֣לֶּה אֲדֹנִ֑י וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֗י הַמַּלְאָךְ֙ הַדֹּבֵ֣ר בִּ֔י אֲנִ֥י אַרְאֶ֖ךָּ מָה־הֵ֥מָּה אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said: What are these, my Lord? and the angel that spoke in me, said to me: I will shew thee what these are:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä sanoin: minun herrani, kutka nämät ovat? Ja enkeli, joka minun kanssani puhui, sanoi minulle: minä osoitan sinulle, kutka nämät ovat.
verses.king_james: Then said I, O my lord, what are these? And the angel that talked with me said unto me, I will shew thee what these be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondit vir qui stabat inter myrteta, et dixit : Isti sunt quos misit Dominus ut perambulent terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֗עַן הָאִ֛ישׁ הָעֹמֵ֥ד בֵּין־הַהֲדַסִּ֖ים וַיֹּאמַ֑ר אֵ֚לֶּה אֲשֶׁ֣ר שָׁלַ֣ח יְהֹוָ֔ה לְהִתְהַלֵּ֖ךְ בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the man that stood among the myrtle trees answered, and said: These are they, whom the Lord hath sent to walk through the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja mies, joka myrttien seassa oli, vastasi ja sanoi: nämät ovat ne, jotka Herra on lähettänyt vaeltamaan lävitse maan.
verses.king_james: And the man that stood among the myrtle trees answered and said, These are they whom the Lord hath sent to walk to and fro through the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et responderunt angelo Domini, qui stabat inter myrteta, et dixerunt : Perambulavimus terram, et ecce omnis terra habitatur, et quiescit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּעֲנ֞וּ אֶת־מַלְאַ֣ךְ יְהֹוָ֗ה הָֽעֹמֵד֙ בֵּ֣ין הַהֲדַסִּ֔ים וַיֹּאמְר֖וּ הִתְהַלַּ֣כְנוּ בָאָ֑רֶץ וְהִנֵּ֥ה כׇל־הָאָ֖רֶץ יֹשֶׁ֥בֶת וְשֹׁקָֽטֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they answered the angel of the Lord, that stood among the myrtle trees, and said: We have walked through the earth, and behold all the earth is inhabited, and is at rest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he vastasivat Herran enkelille, joka myrttien seassa oli, ja sanoivat: me olemme vaeltaneet maan lävitse, ja katso, kaikki maa istuu alallansa.
verses.king_james: And they answered the angel of the Lord that stood among the myrtle trees, and said, We have walked to and fro through the earth, and, behold, all the earth sitteth still, and is at rest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondit angelus Domini, et dixit : Domine exercituum, usquequo tu non misereberis Jerusalem, et urbium Juda, quibus iratus es ? iste jam septuagesimus annus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַן מַלְאַךְ־יְהֹוָה֮ וַיֹּאמַר֒ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת עַד־מָתַ֗י אַתָּה֙ לֹֽא־תְרַחֵ֣ם אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם וְאֵ֖ת עָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר זָעַ֔מְתָּה זֶ֖ה שִׁבְעִ֥ים שָׁנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the angel of the Lord answered, and said: O Lord of hosts, how long wilt thou not have mercy on Jerusalem, and on the cities of Juda, with which thou hast been angry? this is now the seventieth year.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin vastasi Herran enkeli ja sanoi: Herra Zebaot, kuinka kauvan et sinä tahdo armahtaa Jerusalemia, ja Juudan kaupungeita, joille vihainen olet ollut nyt seitsemänkymmentä ajastaikaa?
verses.king_james: Then the angel of the Lord answered and said, O Lord of hosts, how long wilt thou not have mercy on Jerusalem and on the cities of Judah, against which thou hast had indignation these threescore and ten years?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondit Dominus angelo qui loquebatur in me verba bona, verba consolatoria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַן יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶת־הַמַּלְאָ֛ךְ הַדֹּבֵ֥ר בִּ֖י דְּבָרִ֣ים טוֹבִ֑ים דְּבָרִ֖ים נִחֻמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord answered the angel, that spoke in me, good words, comfortable words.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra vastasi sille enkelille, joka minun kanssani puhui, hyvillä ja lohdullisilla sanoilla.
verses.king_james: And the Lord answered the angel that talked with me with good words and comfortable words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit ad me angelus qui loquebatur in me : Clama, dicens :   Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum :  Zelatus sum Jerusalem et Sion zelo magno,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֗י הַמַּלְאָךְ֙ הַדֹּבֵ֣ר בִּ֔י קְרָ֣א לֵאמֹ֔ר כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֑וֹת קִנֵּ֧אתִי לִירוּשָׁלַ֛͏ִם וּלְצִיּ֖וֹן קִנְאָ֥ה גְדוֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the angel that spoke in me, said to me: Cry thou, saying: Thus saith the Lord of hosts: I am zealous for Jerusalem, and Sion with a great zeal.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja enkeli, joka minua puhutteli, sanoi minulle: saarnaa ja sano: näin sanoo Herra Zebaot: minä olen suuresti kiivastunut Jerusalemille ja Zionille;
verses.king_james: So the angel that communed with me said unto me, Cry thou, saying, Thus saith the Lord of hosts; I am jealous for Jerusalem and for Zion with a great jealousy.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ira magna ego irascor super gentes opulentas,  quia ego iratus sum parum,  ipsi vero adjuverunt in malum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקֶ֤צֶף גָּדוֹל֙ אֲנִ֣י קֹצֵ֔ף עַל־הַגּוֹיִ֖ם הַשַּֽׁאֲנַנִּ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר אֲנִי֙ קָצַ֣פְתִּי מְּעָ֔ט וְהֵ֖מָּה עָזְר֥וּ לְרָעָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I am angry with a great anger with the wealthy nations: for I was angry a little, but they helped forward the evil.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä olen juuri vihainen myös suruttomille pakanoille; sillä minä olin ainoasti vähän vihainen, mutta he auttivat hävitykseen.
verses.king_james: And I am very sore displeased with the heathen that are at ease: for I was but a little displeased, and they helped forward the affliction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus :  Revertar ad Jerusalem in misericordiis,  et domus mea ædificabitur in ea, ait Dominus exercituum,  et perpendiculum extendetur super Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן כֹּֽה־אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה שַׁ֤בְתִּי לִירוּשָׁלַ֙͏ִם֙ בְּֽרַחֲמִ֔ים בֵּיתִי֙ יִבָּ֣נֶה בָּ֔הּ נְאֻ֖ם יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֑וֹת (וקוה) [וְקָ֥ו] יִנָּטֶ֖ה עַל־יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord: I will return to Jerusalem in mercies: my house shall be built in it, saith the Lord of hosts: and the building line shall be stretched forth upon Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden näin sanoo Herra: minä palajan Jerusalemiin laupiudella, ja minun huoneeni pitää hänessä rakennettaman, sanoo Herra Zebaot; ja Jerusalemin päälle pitää mittanuora vedettämän.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord; I am returned to Jerusalem with mercies: my house shall be built in it, saith the Lord of hosts, and a line shall be stretched forth upon Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhuc clama, dicens :  Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum :  Adhuc affluent civitates meæ bonis,  et consolabitur adhuc Dominus Sion, et eliget adhuc Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ע֣וֹד ׀ קְרָ֣א לֵאמֹ֗ר כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת ע֛וֹד תְּפוּצֶ֥נָה עָרַ֖י מִטּ֑וֹב וְנִחַ֨ם יְהֹוָ֥ה עוֹד֙ אֶת־צִיּ֔וֹן וּבָחַ֥ר ע֖וֹד בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Cry yet, saying: Thus saith the Lord of hosts: My cities shall yet flow with good things: and the Lord will yet comfort Sion, and he will yet choose Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja saarnaa vielä ja sano: näin sanoo Herra Zebaot: taas pitää minun kaupungeilleni hyvin käymän, ja Herra on Zionia taas lohduttava, ja Jerusalem taas valitaan.
verses.king_james: Cry yet, saying, Thus saith the Lord of hosts; My cities through prosperity shall yet be spread abroad; and the Lord shall yet comfort Zion, and shall yet choose Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et levavi oculos meos, et vidi, et ecce quatuor cornua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשָּׂ֥א אֶת־עֵינַ֖י וָאֵ֑רֶא וְהִנֵּ֖ה אַרְבַּ֥ע קְרָנֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I lifted up my eyes, and saw: and behold four horns.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä nostin silmäni ja näin: ja katso, siellä oli neljä sarvea.
verses.king_james: Then lifted I up mine eyes, and saw, and behold four horns.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi ad angelum qui loquebatur in me : Quid sunt hæc ? Et dixit ad me : Hæc sunt cornua quæ ventilaverunt Judam, et Israël, et Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֗ר אֶל־הַמַּלְאָ֛ךְ הַדֹּבֵ֥ר בִּ֖י מָה־אֵ֑לֶּה וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֔י אֵ֤לֶּה הַקְּרָנוֹת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר זֵר֣וּ אֶת־יְהוּדָ֔ה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And I said to the angel that spoke in me: What are these? And he said to me: These are the horns that have scattered Juda, and Israel, and Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä sanoin enkelille, joka puhui minun kanssani: mitä nämät ovat? Hän sanoi minulle: nämät ovat ne sarvet, jotka Juudan, Israelin ja Jerusalemin hajoittaneet ovat.
verses.king_james: And I said unto the angel that talked with me, What be these? And he answered me, These are the horns which have scattered Judah, Israel, and Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ostendit mihi Dominus quatuor fabros.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּרְאֵ֣נִי יְהֹוָ֔ה אַרְבָּעָ֖ה חָרָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord shewed me four smiths.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra osoitti minulle neljä seppää.
verses.king_james: And the Lord shewed me four carpenters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi : Quid isti veniunt facere ? Qui ait, dicens : Hæc sunt cornua quæ ventilaverunt Judam per singulos viros, et nemo eorum levavit caput suum : et venerunt isti deterrere ea, ut dejiciant cornua gentium, quæ levaverunt cornu super terram Juda ut dispergerent eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֕ר מָ֛ה אֵ֥לֶּה בָאִ֖ים לַֽעֲשׂ֑וֹת וַיֹּ֣אמֶר לֵאמֹ֗ר אֵ֣לֶּה הַקְּרָנ֞וֹת אֲשֶׁר־זֵ֣רוּ אֶת־יְהוּדָ֗ה כְּפִי־אִישׁ֙ לֹא־נָשָׂ֣א רֹאשׁ֔וֹ וַיָּבֹ֤אוּ אֵ֙לֶּה֙ לְהַחֲרִ֣יד אֹתָ֔ם לְיַדּ֞וֹת אֶת־קַרְנ֣וֹת הַגּוֹיִ֗ם הַנֹּשְׂאִ֥ים קֶ֛רֶן אֶל־אֶ֥רֶץ יְהוּדָ֖ה לְזָרוֹתָֽהּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And I said: What come these to do? and he spoke, saying: These are the horns which have scattered Juda every man apart, and none of them lifted up his head: and these are come to fray them, to cast down the horns of the nations, that have lifted up the horn upon the land of Juda to scatter it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin minä sanoin: mitä ne tahtovat tehdä? Hän sanoi: ne ovat ne sarvet, jotka Juudan hajoittaneet ovat, juuri niin, ettei kenkään ole voinut päätänsä nostaa; nämät ovat tulleet niitä karkottamaan, ja lohkaisemaan pakanain sarvia, jotka Juudan maan ylitse sarven nostaneet ovat sitä hajoittaaksensa.
verses.king_james: Then said I, What come these to do? And he spake, saying, These are the horns which have scattered Judah, so that no man did lift up his head: but these are come to fray them, to cast out the horns of the Gentiles, which lifted up their horn over the land of Judah to scatter it.
